theme.style: Deep Australian vineyard world rendered in forest-green darkness, rich burgundy wine-tones, and warm harvest-gold light. Backgrounds feel like premium earthy terroir — organic, grounded, and authoritative. Cinematic rim lighting and layered depth evoke the prestige and complexity of serious viticulture, while gold accents inject warmth and premium energy across every composition.

slides.label: Summary Page
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with sweeping arcs of molten harvest-gold and burnished amber light cutting diagonally across a deep forest-green to near-black background, dramatic cinematic rim lighting bleeding from the lower right, large softly glowing spherical forms in burgundy-wine tones dissolving at the edges, subtle fine-grain texture throughout, the upper 30% fading to calm deep green-black for text legibility. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Vineyard Details
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring layered translucent planes of deep burgundy and forest-green frosted glass stacked at steep converging angles, each razor edge catching a thin luminous line of harvest-gold light, long cast shadows pooling in the depths between layers, the upper region fading smoothly to near-black deep green, subtle organic grain texture on each plane surface. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Repairs
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with a single massive diffused sphere of warm amber-gold light erupting from the bottom-left corner of a deep forest-green to obsidian background, long horizontal gradients of harvest-gold dissolving into dark burgundy midtones, thin luminous wisps of gold drifting upward, the upper portion deeply calm and near-black, subtle smoke-like depth layering throughout. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Growth
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art depicting flowing aurora wave ribbons in deep forest-green, rich burgundy, and warm harvest-gold sweeping horizontally across a dark near-black canvas, soft volumetric light rays bleeding through the ribbon layers from a central mid-frame source, edges dissolving into deep shadow, the upper 30% a calm unlit forest-green expanse, fine atmospheric particle scatter throughout. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Pins
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with a vast constellation of tiny harvest-gold and warm amber dots scattered across a deep forest-green to midnight-black expanse, connected by hair-thin luminous golden threads forming irregular geometric clusters, a soft diffused glow of burgundy pooling in the lower center, the top third open, dark, and uncluttered with a faint grain texture across the whole surface. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Yield Estimate
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring liquid amber and molten harvest-gold pools bleeding and swirling into deep burgundy-wine darkness from the bottom-right corner, fluid organic forms with soft reflective surfaces catching rim light, layered depth of field blur pulling focus toward the luminous golden core, the upper region dissolving into a calm deep forest-green black, subtle metallic sheen texture throughout. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Spray Program
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with towering frosted geometric shards of deep forest-green and dark burgundy rising from the bottom of frame, each faceted surface catching dramatic harvest-gold rim lighting from the upper left, long angular shadows cast across a deep obsidian background, translucent glass-morphism layers overlapping with subtle refractive distortion, the upper 30% fading to a calm near-black with minimal detail. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups
